title: calorhabdos formosana
intro: Calorhabdos formosana, also known as Taiwan calophyllum or Formosan calorhabdos, is a plant species native to Taiwan, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calorhabdos formosana include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing cardiovascular and digestive system support. The herbal preparation of Calorhabdos formosana typically involves making a decoction or infusion from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs for various health benefits.
